name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.PedalLegsHelper.SpeedAsymmetry
summary: Random offset applied per leg to the angular speed to desynchronize the pedaling - set to 0 to disable, otherwise should be set to less than the angularSpeed value.
remarks:
Default value = 8.0f.
            Min value = -10.0f.
            Max value = 10.0f.
